iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 46% (stable). Day 24 Hour 08 UTC. CRITICAL. Trump power plant ultimatum keeps nuclear rhetoric at peak. No new nuclear-specific signals. IAEA Grossi diplomatic re-engagement only off-ramp. Natanz/Bushehr previously struck. Dimona near-strike. Updated 2026-03-23T08:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 24 Hour 08 UTC. IMMINENT. Ultimatum ~10hrs to deadline (Mon 23:44 GMT). IRGC escalates counter-threat: will hit Israeli + Gulf power plants. Iran ready to close Hormuz 'indefinitely.' IEA: worst energy crisis since 1970s. UK emergency Cobra. Asia markets crashing. Brent $112+. Updated 2026-03-23T08:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Iran fires cluster munitions at Manama, Bahrain
latest_news.text: Cluster munitions reportedly fired against targets in Manama, Bahrain. First use of cluster munitions against a Gulf state capital.

latest_news.headline: Israel slashes outbound flights to 1/hour, cancels schools
latest_news.text: Israel drastically reduces outbound flights - 1 per hour, 50 pax max. All schools cancelled Sun-Mon.

latest_news.headline: 180+ wounded in Iranian strikes on Arad/Dimona near nuclear facility
latest_news.text: At least 180 wounded in Iranian missile strikes on Arad and Dimona, near Dimona nuclear reactor.

latest_news.headline: IEA: 11M bpd lost - worst energy crisis in modern history
latest_news.text: IEA chief: 11M bpd lost, worse than 1973+1979 oil crises combined.

latest_news.headline: Asian markets crash - Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%
latest_news.text: Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%, HK -3%. Won weakest since 2009. Brent $112+.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 82% (stable). Day 24 Hour 08 UTC. IMMINENT. War continues 'several more weeks.' IDF expanded ground+air, 2nd division deployed. IRGC commanding Hezbollah. Litani bridge strikes continue. 1000+ Lebanese killed. Updated 2026-03-23T08:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: IDF approves expansion of ground+air attacks - 2nd division deployed
latest_news.text: IDF approves expansion of ground and air attacks against Hezbollah. Second division deployed to southern Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: Lebanese PM: IRGC officers commanding Hezbollah operations
latest_news.text: Lebanese PM Salam says IRGC members are commanding Hezbollah operations in ongoing war against Israel.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge - key Litani River crossing
latest_news.text: Israel destroys Qasmiya Bridge, key Litani River crossing linking south Lebanon to rest of country.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 24 Hour 06 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began. NATO Patriot batteries active at Incirlik. No new developments. Updated 2026-03-23T06:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 34% (up). Day 24 Hour 08 UTC. CRITICAL. ISW: Russia LIKELY BEGUN Spring-Summer 2026 offensive. Peace talks paused (Iran war). Oil shock boosting Russian revenue. Deadliest day 2026 (1,610 KIA). Updated 2026-03-23T08:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: ISW: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 26% (up). Day 24 Hour 08 UTC. ELEVATED. Eid ceasefire through midnight Mar 24 but massively violated. Post-Eid full war near-certain tomorrow. Kabul hospital strike 400+ killed. ICG warns deadly violence. Updated 2026-03-23T08:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Eid ceasefire breaches mount: Mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika, 1 killed
latest_news.text: Taliban accuses Pakistan of firing mortars in Kunar and Paktika during Eid ceasefire - 1 civilian killed. Taliban chief of staff calls it 'deception.' ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Ceasefire technically holds through Mar 24 midnight but fraying badly. Multiple breach reports.

top_signals: ULTIMATUM ~10HRS: Deadline Mon 23:44 GMT - Iran must open Hormuz or US hits power plants
IRGC COUNTER-ESCALATION: Will hit Israeli power plants + Gulf power plants if US strikes Iranian ones
HORMUZ 'INDEFINITELY': Iran military declares ready to close Strait indefinitely - not just a threat
FRESH TEHRAN STRIKES: Israel launches new wave extensive strikes on Tehran infrastructure
ENERGY CRISIS WORSE THAN 1970s: IEA chief - 'Two oil crises and one gas crash put all together'
UK EMERGENCY COBRA: Starmer chairs meeting with BoE Governor on economic fallout
RUSSIA OFFENSIVE: ISW assesses Russia LIKELY BEGUN Spring-Summer 2026 offensive
CLUSTER ON MANAMA: Iran fires cluster munitions at Bahrain capital
LEBANON EXPANSION: IDF ground+air attacks expanded, 2nd division, war 'continues weeks'
GLOBAL CAUTION: US State Dept issues worldwide 'increased caution' advisory for Americans

new: Iran threatens complete Hormuz closure + destroy Gulf water/energy (counter to ultimatum)
Israel launches new wave extensive strikes on Tehran (Mar 23 ~03:33 CET)

UK emergency Cobra meeting on economic fallout

zone_changes: russia_ukraine: CRITICAL (up) - spring offensive likely begun
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: No meaningful de-escalation signals. Iran doubled down on counter-threats. Russia launched new offensive. Pakistan ceasefire dead.

latest_news.headline: IRGC escalates: will hit Israeli AND Gulf power plants if US strikes Iran's
latest_news.text: IRGC statement: will attack Israel's power plants and those supplying US bases in Gulf if Trump carries out threat to 'obliterate' Iran's power network. Major counter-escalation.

latest_news.headline: Iran military declares ready to close Strait of Hormuz 'indefinitely'
latest_news.text: Iran's military says ready to close Hormuz indefinitely if Trump bombs power plants. Upgrading from 'threatened' to 'ready and prepared.'

latest_news.headline: IEA chief: war energy crunch worse than 1973+1979 oil crises and Ukraine gas crisis COMBINED
latest_news.text: Fatih Birol: 'Two oil crises and one gas crash put all together.' IEA consulting Asia/Europe on additional stockpile releases.

latest_news.headline: UK Starmer chairs emergency Cobra on war economic fallout
latest_news.text: Starmer, Chancellor Reeves, BoE Governor Bailey attend. UK bonds steeper decline than peers. Heavy UK dependence on imported natural gas.

latest_news.headline: Asia markets crash continues - Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%, HK -3%
latest_news.text: Wave of selling across Asia-Pacific. US dollar rising as safe haven. Brent $112+. Won weakest since 2009.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 24, 08:04 UTC). TRUMP ULTIMATUM ~10hrs to deadline (Mon 23:44 GMT / Tue 01:44 CET). IRGC counter-escalates: will hit Israeli + Gulf power plants. Iran ready to close Hormuz 'indefinitely.' Israel fresh Tehran strikes. Asia markets crash. IEA: worst energy crisis since 1970s. UK emergency Cobra. Brent $112+. No off-ramps visible. D-Day tomorrow for Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire expiry.
de_escalation_watch: DE-ESCALATION: None. IRGC has ESCALATED counter-threats to include Israeli power plants + Gulf power plants. Iran ready for 'indefinite' Hormuz closure. Any diplomatic softening from earlier has been OVERRUN. Net trajectory: further escalation toward ultimatum deadline. No viable off-ramp.
